slides.prompt:
STYLE — Korean handwritten note-style presentation slide, 16:9 landscape:
- Background: warm cream paper (#FCF8F2), subtle paper texture, no lines/grid.
- Text: neat black felt-tip pen Korean handwriting (매직펜 손글씨), thick confident strokes, consistent stroke weight throughout. Titles large and bold; body text medium. All Korean text must be rendered VERBATIM as quoted — every syllable exactly as written, no invented characters.
- Accents: blue (#2B4FD8) double underline below the title; yellow highlighter (#FFE9A8) behind 1-3 keywords only; red (#D8342B) hand-drawn doodles (small stars, sparkle ticks) used sparingly at corners.
- Numbers and Latin text in the same handwritten style.
- Clean composition, generous margins, nothing touching the edges.

LAYOUT — Cover slide:
- Very large title in 2 lines, top-left area: "AI, 어디까지 왔고" / "어디로 가는가"
- Blue double underline sweeping under the title.
- Subtitle row of 3 short phrases separated by middle dots, each with yellow highlighter: "2026년 7월 체크포인트" · "렌즈는 Claude Code" · "병목의 이동"
- Bottom-left byline in smaller handwriting: "AI 세미나 · 2026. 7"
- Bottom-right: waving robot mascot (round head, antenna with red dot, smiling) with a speech bubble saying "출발!"
- One red doodle star near the title.

No page number anywhere on the slide.

STYLE — Korean handwritten note-style presentation slide, 16:9 landscape:
- Background: warm cream paper (#FCF8F2), subtle paper texture, no lines/grid.
- Text: neat black felt-tip pen Korean handwriting (매직펜 손글씨), thick confident strokes, consistent stroke weight throughout. All Korean text must be rendered VERBATIM as quoted — every syllable exactly as written, no invented characters.
- Accents: blue (#2B4FD8) double underline; yellow highlighter (#FFE9A8) behind key phrase; red (#D8342B) small doodles sparingly.
- Clean composition, generous margins.

LAYOUT — Single-message slide:
- Large 2-line statement in the center: "병목은 '구현'에서" / "'인지'로 이동했다" with yellow highlighter on the word "'인지'", blue double underline beneath the statement.
- One rounded banner below with the supporting line: "능력은 지수로 ↑ · 단가는 폭락 ↓ · 이해 속도만 상수 →"
- Small robot mascot bottom-right; sparse, lots of cream space.

No page number anywhere on the slide.

LAYOUT — Section divider slide, intentionally sparse:
- Center-left: circled section number "①" followed by large title: "지금, 어디까지 왔나"
- Blue double underline under the title.
- One line of smaller subtext below: "2026년 7월의 스냅샷" (yellow highlighter on "스냅샷").
- A single rounded-rectangle banner lower on the slide with the punchline: "데모의 해는 끝났고, 인프라의 해가 됐다"
- Small robot mascot bottom-right with a red sparkle. Lots of empty cream space.

No page number anywhere on the slide.

STYLE — Korean handwritten note-style presentation slide, 16:9 landscape:

LAYOUT — Two-column contrast:
- Title at top: "일선의 증언 — 통째 위임은 일상" with blue double underline.
- Two large rounded cards side by side. Left card header "Karpathy" (black outline), right card header "Cherny" (green outline).
- Left card 3 short lines: "작년 12월 이후" / "코드 한 줄도" / "직접 안 썼다"
- Right card 3 short lines: "폰에서 하루" / "수십 개 PR을" / "배포한다" — yellow highlighter on "수십 개 PR". Small robot mascot beside the right card.
- Bottom full-width punchline banner: "괴짜의 무용담이 아니라, 새 표준의 예고편" with red doodle stars at both ends.

No page number anywhere on the slide.

- Short annotation in smaller handwriting under box 3: "명령-응답 → 목표-루프"
- Bottom punchline banner: "돕는 도구에서, 일하는 주체로"
- Robot mascot walking along the arrows.
